candidate.notes: same label 'ceiling light' across adjacent places

object_a.label: ceiling light
object_a.description: flush-mount round ceiling light in hallway
object_a.long_form_open_description: Small round flush-mounted ceiling fixture with frosted glass and metallic trim centered in the corridor ceiling about halfway down the visible hallway. Provides warm ambient illumination; plaster ceiling around it is textured.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Mounted on the central ceiling above the hallway path, roughly aligned with the corridor centerline.
object_a.object_text_short: flush-mount round ceiling light in hallway
object_a.object_text_long: center sector | Small round flush-mounted ceiling fixture with frosted glass and metallic trim centered in the corridor ceiling about halfway down the visible hallway. Provides warm ambient illumination; plaster ceiling around it is textured.

object_b.label: ceiling light
object_b.long_form_open_description: White frosted dome flush-mount ceiling light centered in the corridor ceiling. Small circular fixture with slightly diffused light; mounted directly to textured ceiling. Provides warm ambient illumination for the narrow hallway.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: mounted on ceiling above the center of the corridor, roughly between the left closet doors and the right-side doorway
object_b.object_text_long: center sector | White frosted dome flush-mount ceiling light centered in the corridor ceiling. Small circular fixture with slightly diffused light; mounted directly to textured ceiling. Provides warm ambient illumination for the narrow hallway.
